entities.name: STREPTOMYCES
entities.description: Sixteen strains showing potential for plant growth-promotion activities isolated from herbal vermicompost

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTION
entities.description: Activities that promote the growth of plants, also referred to as PGP

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop for which Streptomyces strains show PGP activities

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop for which Streptomyces strains show PGP activities

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop for which Streptomyces strains show PGP activities

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop for which Streptomyces strains show PGP activities

entities.name: HERBAL VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: The source environment from which the Streptomyces strains were isolated

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of decoding the genome sequences and assemblies of the Streptomyces strains

entities.name: GC CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of nitrogenous bases in a DNA molecule that are either guanine or cytosine

entities.name: SEQUENCE SIMILARITY
entities.description: The extent to which nucleic acid sequences are similar, measured by shared orthologs

entities.name: SHARED ORTHOLOG
entities.description: Genes shared between different species or strains used to determine sequence similarity

entities.name: MOLECULAR FUNCTIONS
entities.description: The activities of gene products identified across the 16 Streptomyces strains

entities.name: BIOCONTROL
entities.description: The use of organisms to control pests or diseases

entities.name: SIDEROPHORES
entities.description: Iron-chelating compounds involved in PGP and biocontrol

entities.name: AUXIN
entities.description: A plant hormone involved in PGP and biocontrol

entities.name: HYDROCYANIC ACID
entities.description: A compound involved in PGP and biocontrol

entities.name: CHITINASE
entities.description: An enzyme that degrades chitin, involved in PGP and biocontrol

entities.name: CELLULASE
entities.description: An enzyme that degrades cellulose, involved in PGP and biocontrol

entities.name: GENETIC SIMILARITY
entities.description: The degree of similarity between the genetic makeup of target and publically available Streptomyces strains
